**What `[improve]` is**

`[improve]` is sent by `HourlyIntrospectionWorkflow` — an hourly Temporal workflow defined in `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/workflows/introspection.py`. It fires the activity `send_discord_introspection_nudge` (in `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/introspection_act.py`), which injects the string `[improve]` into BigClungus's session via the local inject endpoint (`localhost:9876`), with `user="temporal-sweeper"`.
